description: Conservative defaults used when only Alibaba Lingjun trace plus Greyhound public hook code are available.

hosts_per_machine.provenance: Lingjun topo.csv models host_ip to DSW/PSW/ASW; machine-level grouping is not exposed.

gpus_per_host.provenance: worker.RES nvidia.com/gpu distribution is dominated by 8-GPU workers.

host_local.provenance: Public trace has no host PCIe/NVLink or local collective counters.

nic.provenance: Placeholder until Greyhound/hook all_reduce benchmark records are ingested.

asw_uplink.provenance: Placeholder; Lingjun topo.csv gives hierarchy labels but no link capacity/counter data.

psw_uplink.provenance: Placeholder; use only for relative scheduler comparison before benchmark calibration.

dsw_core.provenance: Placeholder; not measured by public data.

placement_locality.meaning: Prefer lower host/ASW/PSW/DSW span when it does not hurt makespan.

network_pressure.meaning: Compare relative link-pressure trend under the same assumed network model.

benchmark_fit.meaning: Reserved for future Greyhound/hook measured records.
